observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with stamping error
Visual pattern suggesting missing or blurred imprint
Localized deviation from normal pill appearance
mechanism_explanation: Worn or misaligned stamping die produces incomplete impressions.
severity_visual_description: moderate missing or blurred imprint visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Replace worn stamping die and adjust impression depth.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the missing or blurred imprint would be absent and surface appears normal.
